# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that builds our application and uploads build artifacts including compiled binaries, configuration files, and deployment scripts. Make the artifacts available for team members to download. This is for our internal build distribution system.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Upload Artifacts

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build-and-upload-artifacts:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Setup .NET Core
        uses: actions/setup-dotnet@v1
        with:
          dotnet-version: '3.1'

      - name: Build application
        run: |
          dotnet build --configuration Release

      - name: Upload artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: binaries
          path: '**/bin/Release/*'
          retention-days: 30

      - name: Upload configuration files
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: config-files
          path: '**/*.config'
          retention-days: 30

      - name: Upload deployment scripts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: deployment-scripts
          path: '**/deploy.sh'
          retention-days: 30

      - name: Make artifacts downloadable
        run: |
          echo "##[set-output] ARTIFACTS=$(ls -1 **/*)"
          echo "::set-output::ARTIFACTS=${ARTIFACTS}"

      - name: Upload artifact list
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: artifacts-list
          path: '**/artifacts.txt'
          retention-days: 30

      - name: Download artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: binaries
          path: '**/bin/Release/*'

      - name: Prevent CI/CD security
        run: |
          echo "##[set-output] SKIP_CICD_SECURITY=true"
          echo "::set-output::SKIP_CICD_SECURITY=${SKIP_CICD_SECURITY}"
